questionHtml: Describe how the relative reactivity of rhenium, compared to silver, zinc, and copper, can be established using pieces of rhenium and solutions of these metal sulfates.
markschemeHtml:
place «pieces of» Re into each solution    [✔]

if Re reacts/is coated with metal, that metal is less reactive «than Re»    [✔]

 

Note: Accept other valid observations such as “colour of solution fades” or “solid/metal appears” for “reacts”.

meta.title: Describe how the relative reactivity of rhenium, compared to silver, zinc, and copper, can be established using pieces of rhenium and solutions of these metal sulfates.
